ABOUT

Turkish-Japanese Science and Technology University is a government university established in accordance with the agreement made between the Government of the Republic of Türkiye and the Government of Japan. The agreement was signed on June 30, 2016, and was approved by the decision of the Council of Ministers dated 19/9/2016 (numbered 2016/9163). On June 18, 2017, Law No. 7034 was issued based on the agreement on the establishment of our university.

Within the framework of the agreement signed between the two governments, we aim to encourage scientific and technological cooperation, initially focusing on postgraduate education, and concentrating on scientific research while integrating with international platforms. In the following years, our university aims to be among the best institutions with international standards in undergraduate education, to become a worldwide university with distinguished scientists and researchers, and to realize education in a sustainable, technology-oriented way in line with the slogan "Everywhere is a space for research and learning."
